expectations.evidence: Step 1: "bun add -D @biomejs/biome" -- installs Biome as a dev dependency using bun.
biome.json formatter section: "\"indentStyle\": \"tab\"" -- configures tab indentation.
biome.json javascript.formatter section: "\"quoteStyle\": \"single\"" -- configures single quotes for JavaScript/TypeScript.

expectations.text: Response sets noUnusedVariables and noUnusedImports to error
expectations.evidence: biome.json linter rules: "\"noUnusedVariables\": \"error\", \"noUnusedImports\": \"error\"" -- both set to error level.

expectations.text: Response adds package.json scripts (lint, format, check)
expectations.evidence: Section 3 adds scripts including: "\"lint\": \"biome lint .\"", "\"format\": \"biome format --write .\"", "\"check\": \"biome check .\"" plus additional lint:fix, format:check, check:fix, and validate scripts.
